race.comment: Looks another ideal race for LAKE FOREST (7) who was given a short break after winning dominantly over 1000m at this track. He's since won a trial and profiles as if he'll continue to raise the bar. Rates the one to beat. SPIRITED DEFENCE (3) saluted when resuming last start at Ballarat Synthetic over this distance. Has come back nicely and can go on with the job. PRINCE OF BROOKY (9) raced on the speed and kept going to score by 1.3 lengths when resuming last time out over 1100m at this track. Have to respect again in another nice race for him. HUMBLE TRADER (8) will find this a little easier after missing the frame in town last time, finishing eighth over 1200m at Sandown-Lakeside. First go synthetic here but is in the mix.
